home.hero_subtitle: Professional outdoor instruction for children ages 4–14 in Poiana Brașov
home.featured_activities_subtitle: Unique experiences for children in the heart of nature
home.about_body: For over 10 years, Little Club Friends has been shaping confident, happy children on the slopes and trails of Poiana Brașov. Certified instructors, personalised attention, and a genuine love for the mountains.
home.cta_subtitle: Book a lesson today and let your child discover the mountains.
home.value_1_desc: All instructors are professionally certified and trained
home.value_2_desc: From first-timers to advanced — we meet every child where they are
home.value_3_desc: The most beautiful mountain resort in Romania, every season
home.value_4_desc: Small groups and private lessons for real progress

instructors.page_subtitle: Passionate professionals dedicated to children's safety and fun
instructors.fallback_desc: Our team of certified instructors brings years of experience and genuine passion to every lesson. Safety, fun, and real progress — that is our promise to every child and family.

gallery.page_subtitle: Beautiful moments with Little Club Friends

about.page_subtitle: Passion for nature and sport, dedication for children
about.story_title: Born from a love of mountains
about.story_body_1: Little Club Friends started as Little Ski Friends — a small winter ski school in Poiana Brașov run by two passionate instructors. Over the years, it grew into a year-round adventure school that has trained over 500 children.
about.story_body_2: Today we offer skiing, snowboarding, mountain biking, hiking, and paddleboarding — all taught by certified professionals who truly care about every child's progress and safety.
about.value_1_desc: Every lesson starts with safety. Certified instructors, quality equipment, and constant attention to each child.
about.value_2_desc: Our instructors are nationally certified and continuously trained.
about.value_3_desc: We genuinely love the mountains and pass that love to every child.
about.value_4_desc: Every child is welcome, regardless of experience, age, or ability.
about.team_cta_subtitle: Dedicated, certified, and passionate about teaching children.

booking.page_subtitle: Fill in the form and we will contact you as soon as possible
booking.success_message: Thank you! We will contact you as soon as possible.
booking.error_message: An error occurred. Please try again.

contact.page_subtitle: We are here for any questions
contact.book_card_desc: Fill in the booking form and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

footer.tagline: Adventures for children in the heart of the mountains
